testcase.name: addClassConfiguresConstructorFieldAndMethodInjection()

error.message: No valid constructor found on class io_smallrye_beanbag.smallrye_beanbag_sisu.NamedConstructorDependency

testcase.name: configuresBeansFromNamedAndPlexusMetadataResources()
